description: NLA: modulo, division, or multiplication hint

attempts.llm_response:
<DAFNY_CODE>
method M(n: int) returns (r: int)
  requires n >= 1
  ensures r > 1
  ensures exists d | 2 <= d <= r - 1 :: r % d == 0
{
  r := n * 6;
  assert r % 2 == 0;
}
attempts.dafny_output: Dafny program verifier finished with 2 verified, 0 errors
